Add subtitle file import (VTT / SRT) as a translation source

New subtitle import feature in the Translate panel's Add Translation section:

- AI / Import toggle lets users choose between GPT-4o translation and
  importing an existing subtitle file
- file:importSubtitle IPC channel opens a native file picker filtered to
  .vtt / .srt and returns the file content + metadata to the renderer
- utils/subtitleParser.ts:
    - parseVTT / parseSRT parse file content into { start, end, text } cues
    - matchCuesToSegments maps cues onto transcript segments by timestamp
      overlap; falls back to nearest-start when there is no overlap; merges
      multiple cues that share the same best-matching segment
    - inferLanguageFromFileName auto-detects language from filename
      (e.g. video_Spanish.srt → Spanish)
- On import the language picker is updated to the inferred language if one
  is found; success / error status is shown inline under the button

commit.message:
fix: extract AnalysisCard to client component to allow onClick handler

AnalysisCard had onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} inside a server
component file, which React 19 / Next.js 15 forbids and throws as the
hidden "Server Components render" error in production. Moving AnalysisCard
to its own "use client" file fixes the error.

fix: create batch report skeleton in Python before agent runs

Agents consistently ignore the prompt instruction to create the report
file first and hit max_turns without writing anything. Now Python creates
the skeleton file before the agent runs, and backfills unreported flows
as BLOCKED entries after the agent completes. This ensures
_parse_batch_report() always has a file with proper ### headers to count.

Fix /wifi-portal 404 by detecting route via REQUEST_URI fallback

get_query_var() can return empty for a parameterless rewrite rule depending
on WordPress query processing order. isWifiPortalRequest() now checks both
the registered query var and the raw request path, making the route reliable
regardless of rewrite rule parsing.

commit.message:
feat: seller disclosure upload flow

Unauthenticated token-based upload flow for seller's agents to submit
disclosure documents in response to an offer:

- GET /seller-response?token=  — looks up offer via GSI, returns
  property address and prior upload count for display
- GET /seller-response/upload-url?token=&fileName=&contentType=
  — issues a presigned S3 PUT URL
- POST /seller-response/confirm — stores document under buyer's userId
  in Documents table, updates offer.sellerResponse with status/documentIds,
  emails the buyer via SES

Frontend: standalone /seller-response page (no auth) with drag-and-drop
upload, multi-file support, progress indicator, and "upload more" flow
after success. Follows the same pattern as /viewing-response.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(playback): eliminate infinite re-render loop via stable hook references

The previous fix (79ea969) removed some unstable deps but missed the
real cascade: player.currentTime/duration/playing in useTrackPlayback's
useEffect created continuous re-triggers (~60x/sec during playback), and
every custom hook in the chain returned un-memoized objects causing
cascading reference instability through the entire playback stack.

Changes:
- useTrackPlayback: remove player.currentTime/duration/playing from
  auto-advance useEffect deps (values are read inside setInterval, not
  needed as triggers); stabilize availableTracks default with useMemo
- useChromecast: wrap return value in useMemo
- useCastPlayback: wrap return value in useMemo
- useUnifiedPlaybackControl: wrap return value in useMemo
- useAudioOutput: wrap return value in useMemo

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add dead man's switch: 3 JOSHUA disconnects wipes DOS filesystem

Users booted from JOSHUA 3 times trigger a permanent dead man's switch
that wipes the DOS filesystem, locks all prison/WOPR endpoints, and
leaves the monitor stuck on a BIOS "DISK BOOT FAILURE" screen.

- Track woprDisconnects and diskWiped in participants table
- Auth gate rejects wiped users from all prison endpoints
- Escalating warnings on disconnects 1-2, full wipe animation on 3
- New /api/prison/disk-status endpoint for page-load state check
- Modem plays 5s of dialup then flat tone if monitor is off

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix macOS tunnel service: create LaunchDaemon plist with token

cloudflared service install on macOS (Homebrew) doesn't accept a
token argument — it only works with named tunnels and config files.
For remotely-managed tunnels with tokens, create a LaunchDaemon
plist manually that runs `cloudflared tunnel run --token <TOKEN>`.

- macOS: writes /Library/LaunchDaemons/com.cloudflare.cloudflared.plist
  with KeepAlive + RunAtLoad, logs to /var/log/cloudflared/
- Linux: unchanged (cloudflared service install TOKEN works there)
- Verify step: platform-specific error messages and log paths

commit.message:
Claude/fix android permissions (#2)

* Fix Android MediaProjection consent flow and permissions

The consent activity used singleInstance launch mode, which causes
startActivityForResult() to immediately return RESULT_CANCELED on
Android 12+ (API 31). Change to singleTop so the MediaProjection
consent dialog result is properly delivered back to the activity.

Also add POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission (required on Android 13+/API 33)
so the foreground capture service notification works correctly and the
app's permissions are visible in system settings.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01SwJTX424kufrRixY7UvSQz

* Fix Android MediaProjection consent dialog not appearing

Two issues prevented the screen sharing consent dialog from showing:

1. ensureNotificationPermission() in startCapture() launched a system
   permission dialog that raced with the MediaProjection consent activity,
   causing the consent to be silently canceled. Move the notification
   permission request to onCreate() so it completes before capture starts.

2. requestConsent() used FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK to launch the consent
   activity, placing it in a separate task from the GUI activity. This
   is unnecessary when launching from an Activity context and can
   interfere with activity result delivery on Android 14+. Remove the
   flag so the consent activity stays in the same task.

3. requestConsent() was called from a background thread, which can be
   silently blocked by Android 14's background activity launch
   restrictions. Move the call to the UI thread.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01SwJTX424kufrRixY7UvSQz

---------

commit.message:
Handle text-less photos gracefully as visual media

Instead of returning a 422 error when no text is extracted from an image,
use Gemini vision to generate a bilingual description of what the photo
shows, then save it as document_type 'other' with is_media:true.

This allows photos (selfies, landscapes, screenshots with no text, etc.)
to be stored and searched by their visual content description, while
keeping only the upload date as structured metadata.

commit.message:
fix: extend PSI pick computation to cover next 5 days instead of just today

Rake tasks (predict, compute_picks) and NcaamPredictionJob now default
to computing PSI picks for today + 4 days, matching the ESPN game fetch
window. Previously only today's picks were computed, leaving future
games without PSI data even when predictions and odds existed.

commit.message:
Fix mobile camera: center snowboarder on portrait screens

Root cause was camera lerp lag — camera position lerped slowly (0.06)
but lookTarget snapped instantly to player position. On downhill slopes
the camera lagged high while aiming at the lower player, pinning the
rider to the bottom of the frame.

Fix: faster lerp (0.25) on mobile + camera-relative look direction
instead of player-relative. Also reduces dynamic zoom/pull-back on
mobile to keep framing stable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
009: AI video CLI, video prompt generation, and UI docs alignment (#29)

* feat(agentic): implement Phase 0 quality gates (007-agentic)

Enable existing quality infrastructure without new code:

- Auto-approve/reject thresholds in daily_collector
  - score >= 0.85 → auto_ready
  - score <= 0.3 → rejected
- Duplicate detection via embedding similarity
  - threshold: 0.92
  - skips duplicate items in export
- Freshness weight config (0.15)
- Validation auto-run on content generation
- Fixed relevance normalization base (3.0)

Tests: 29 new tests for auto-gates, dedup, validation
Reference: specs/007-agentic-framework/tasks.md Phase 0

* feat(agentic): implement Phase 1 Foundation (007-agentic)

Core infrastructure for agentic framework:

- HumanReviewBot: Telegram/Slack async notification
  - notify_quality_review(), notify_source_discovered()
  - handle_callback() for approve/reject
  - 72h timeout auto-reject, 24h reminder
- HumanConfirmationGate: review requirement logic
  - Social platforms always require review
  - Trusted domains + high score can auto-approve
  - Configurable thresholds (0.9 approve, 0.3 reject)
- BaseDiscoveryCollector: abstract adapter base
  - SourceCandidate dataclass
  - search() abstract method
- SourceMeta extended fields:
  - human_review_required, api_provider
  - account_handle, last_api_sync
  - enhanced_verification dict

Tests: 57 new tests for notification, gates, source meta
Reference: specs/007-agentic-framework/tasks.md Phase 1

* feat(agentic): implement Phase 2 Quality Layer core (007-agentic)

- Add LangGraph dependencies (langgraph>=0.3.0, langchain-core>=0.3.0)
- Create QualityState TypedDict and QualityGraph state machine
- Add PrimaryValidator with LLM-based content validation
- Add CrossCheckValidator for independent verification
- Implement confidence calculator with weight normalization
- Add FeedbackLoop for human review result tracking

Ultraworked with [Sisyphus](https://github.com/code-yeongyu/oh-my-opencode)
Co-authored-by: Sisyphus <clio-agent@sisyphuslabs.ai>

* fix(tests): use platform-agnostic vault root path in test

The test was using Windows-style path 'C:/test/vault' which is not
recognized as absolute on Linux CI runners, causing path resolution
to prepend PROJECT_ROOT. Changed to relative path 'test_vault' and
updated assertion to check path ends with 'test_vault' instead of
exact match.

- Platform constraints (duration limits per platform)
- Intent-based structure templates (ad, explainer, brand, trend)

  python -m picko video --dry-run                    # Preview plan
  python -m picko video --intent brand --service veo # Brand video
  python -m picko video --service luma runway pika   # Multi-service

Add real-world application simulations

Implements three killer apps for RSCT safety certification:

1. DRONE SWARM ($50K/drone)
   - 8 drones, target tracking mission
   - Wind disturbances, battery constraints
   - RSCT saves $2.15M vs MARL

2. MILITARY CONVOY ($500K/vehicle)
   - 6 vehicles, AMAS-style operations
   - IED/ambush threats, terrain obstacles
   - RSCT saves $65.5M vs MARL (97% collision reduction)

3. WAREHOUSE ROBOTS ($30K/robot)
   - 12 robots, Amazon Kiva-style
   - Shelf aisles, charging stations
   - RSCT saves $6.3M vs MARL

Total simulation: RSCT saves $74M (80% loss reduction)

Run with: python run_applications.py

commit.message:
feat: New power-ups, coins system, and dead player ghost mode

Batch 1 - Three new power-ups with equal spawn weight:
- Speed Burst: 3x speed for 3s (orange trail effect, no size cost)
- Ghost Mode: updated to 5s duration, semi-transparent visual
- Freeze Ring: slows all worms within 15 studs by 50% for 4s, expanding blue ring visual

Batch 2 - Persistent coins system:
- Placement rewards at round end (1st=100, 2nd=60, 3rd=40, 4th=25, else=10)
- Daily login reward (50 coins, 7-day streak bonus=200)
- Coin display in top-right HUD with gold icon
- Coins column on final scoreboard
- New CoinService with PlayerDataService integration

Batch 3 - Dead player ghost mode:
- Toggle between spectating and first-person ghost on death
- 1/3 scale ghost character with neon transparent body
- WASD movement, jump, first-person camera
- Ghost collides with floor/walls but not worms/food
- Ghost destroyed on new round start
- Toggle button on death screen

commit.message:
Fire-and-forget generation: Netlify Background Function + polling UI

Architecture:
- POST /api/start-generation: entry point for book generation
  → Netlify (NETLIFY=true): triggers generate-book-background function, returns immediately
  → Dev local: returns mode='client' for browser-orchestrated generation

- netlify/functions/generate-book-background.mts:
  → Netlify Background Function (max 15 min, responds 202 before completing)
  → Calls /api/generate-page for each page sequentially
  → Calls /api/finalize-book at end (PDF + email)
  → Runs completely independently of the client browser session

- Step5BookGeneration.tsx (rewritten):
  → 'background' mode: shows "processing in background", user can close tab
    Polls /api/book-status every 6s to show live progress grid
    Notifies user their email will be used for notification
  → 'client' mode (dev local): sequential page-by-page generation in browser
  → Both modes: same completion UI (confetti, view book, download PDF)
  → Error recovery: "try again" button

Result: clicking "generate" is fire-and-forget on production Netlify.
User receives email when book is complete regardless of browser state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: insights capture + full harvest report

Add 4 new insights (18 total):
- RLS bypass: pool.query() vs req.dbClient.query() (CRITICAL)
- SQL injection in SET LOCAL — use set_config() (CRITICAL)
- JWT_SECRET needs startup guard (HIGH)
- Parallel validation + review agents — 6x speedup

Full harvest report with 42 extracted artifacts:
- 12 patterns, 10 rules, 6 commands, 7 templates, 7 snippets
- Extracted rules reference (28 rules)
- Patterns documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add /qa pipeline with qa-agent and Playwright MCP browser testing

Introduces an end-to-end QA pipeline that tests a running app like a real
user, then produces both a QA report and reusable Playwright E2E tests.

- Add .claude/agents/qa-agent.md — uses Playwright MCP to navigate the
  UI, tests happy paths + edge cases + error states, screenshots failures,
  writes tasks/qa-report.md and Playwright E2E test files (e2e/*.spec.ts)
- Add .claude/skills/qa/SKILL.md — orchestrates app-scout (reuses cached
  app-context.md) → qa-agent; presents summary with pass/fail counts and
  links to outputs
- qa-agent detects existing Playwright config/test dirs and generates a
  playwright.config.ts if missing; validates test files with --list before
  finishing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix 5 + Fix 6: Workout PDF extraction and USDA-first meal lookup

Fix 5 (photo_handler.py): Add workout classification type to image
classifier prompt. New WORKOUT_PDF_EXTRACTION_PROMPT extracts title,
date, duration, RPE, and full exercise list (name, pattern, sets, reps,
weight). New _extract_workout_pdf_vision() + _handle_workout_pdf()
route workout docs/PDFs to brain with structured context + log_workout
instruction.

Fix 6 (tools_v2.py): In log_meal executor, try USDA lookup before
saving AI estimates. Derives portion grams from AI calorie estimate,
scales USDA nutrients to that portion, upgrades source to 'usda'.
Falls back silently to AI estimates if USDA lookup fails or returns
implausible grams (outside 10-2000g).

Also adds scripts/test_fixes.py — 13 unit tests covering both fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix ERR_ERL_UNEXPECTED_X_FORWARDED_FOR by setting trust proxy

ACA load balancer sets X-Forwarded-For on every request.
Without trust proxy=1, express-rate-limit throws a ValidationError
blocking all /api requests including search.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
